codeReview.summary: The fix commit directly resolves both prior blocking false-negative paths: snapshots are now frozen via deep clone at capture time, and wrapper-key allow-listing now redacts only bfprofile matches so other secret patterns remain detectable. Added scanner tests cover the required nested-partial_signature regression and related wrapper-key leak cases. A previously noted non-blocking harness gap around onboard-dispatch assertion remains.

issues.description: The onboard leg still uses a broad try/catch without asserting successful dispatch. If createOnboardSponsorPackage throws early, the sweep can still pass without fully exercising the onboard path.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Transcript evidence shows the worker skipped runtime-worker Step 5 checks (tsconfig.node typecheck and demo-gallery Playwright) but handoff still marked followedProcedure=true, suggesting either the skill procedure is too strict for pure scanner/test-only fixes or compliance expectations are unclear.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: runtime-worker SKILL.md Step 5 requires `npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json --pretty false` and `npx playwright test src/e2e/demo-gallery.spec.ts --project=desktop --workers 1`; transcript skeleton for session fabca9e0-3dca-47e5-beb4-c4ca67ee412f shows vitest + tsconfig typecheck + full vitest only.

summary: Reviewed fix feature against prior failed review and both commits (ee74c2e, dbd643b). The fix adequately addresses the original blocking failures (snapshot live-reference collapse and scanner over-masking) and adds targeted regression coverage; overall review passes with one non-blocking pre-existing harness assertion gap noted.
